jobs.title: Customer Experience  Specialist
jobs.content: <p><strong>Customer Experience  Specialist</strong></p><p>Opendoor is the US-residential iBuyer + cash-offer-on-your-home platform pioneered around algorithmic-property-valuation-as-a-service & the iBuyer / proptech segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Marketplace
jobs.content: <p>Lead Opendoor's Marketplace engineering function across the Cash Offer / List With Us / Backed Offers stack with Zillow B2B partnership.</p>
